zones.name: 红海与苏伊士走廊
zones.query: ("Red Sea" OR Suez OR "Bab el-Mandeb") (shipping OR vessel OR maritime OR port) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR closure OR strike OR missile OR piracy OR tariff OR sanction)

zones.name: 马六甲海峡
zones.query: ("Strait of Malacca" OR "Malacca Strait") (shipping OR vessel OR maritime OR trade) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR closure OR collision OR piracy OR tariff OR sanction OR congestion)

zones.name: 印度洋航运区域
zones.query: "Indian Ocean" (shipping OR vessel OR maritime OR trade) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR cyclone OR piracy OR tariff OR sanction)

zones.name: 太平洋航运区域
zones.query: ("Pacific Ocean" OR "trans-Pacific") (shipping OR vessel OR maritime OR trade) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR typhoon OR tariff OR sanction OR congestion)

zones.name: 中东海运与空运区域
zones.query: "Middle East" (shipping OR aviation OR airline OR airspace OR logistics OR trade) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR closure OR missile OR tariff OR sanction)

zones.name: 霍尔木兹海峡
zones.query: ("Strait of Hormuz" OR Hormuz) (shipping OR vessel OR oil OR maritime) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR closure OR missile OR tariff OR sanction)

zones.name: 南海航运区域
zones.query: "South China Sea" (shipping OR vessel OR maritime OR trade) (attack OR conflict OR war OR disruption OR collision OR tariff OR sanction)

zones.name: 上海港
zones.query: ("Port of Shanghai" OR "Shanghai port") (closure OR congestion OR strike OR accident OR disruption OR typhoon OR tariff)

zones.name: 新加坡港
zones.query: ("Port of Singapore" OR "Singapore port") (closure OR congestion OR strike OR accident OR disruption OR tariff)

zones.name: 鹿特丹港
zones.query: ("Port of Rotterdam" OR "Rotterdam port") (closure OR congestion OR strike OR accident OR disruption OR tariff)
